'''zhavosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:gracillariid|gracillariid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gracillariid|gracillariid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhavosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhævesheth|zhævesheth]] || [[word:zhæveshej|zhæveshej]] || [[word:zhæveshesh|zhæveshesh]] || [[word:zhæveshe|zhæveshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhavovoshoth|zhavovoshoth]] || [[word:zhavovoshoj|zhavovoshoj]] || [[word:zhavovoshosh|zhavovoshosh]] || [[word:zhavovosho|zhavovosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhavoshoth|zhavoshoth]] || [[word:zhavoshoj|zhavoshoj]] || [[word:zhavoshosh|zhavoshosh]] || [[word:zhavosho|zhavosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhavofshoth|zhavofshoth]] || [[word:zhavofshoj|zhavofshoj]] || [[word:zhavofshosh|zhavofshosh]] || [[word:zhavofshof|zhavofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhavoshotho|zhavoshotho]] || [[word:zhavoshojo|zhavoshojo]] || [[word:zhavoshosho|zhavoshosho]] || [[word:zhavoshoko|zhavoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhavoshoth|zhavoshoth]] || [[word:zhavoshoj|zhavoshoj]] || [[word:zhavoshosh|zhavoshosh]] || [[word:zhavosho|zhavosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhavoshothol|zhavoshothol]] || [[word:zhavoshojol|zhavoshojol]] || [[word:zhavoshoshol|zhavoshoshol]] || [[word:zhavoshokol|zhavoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhavoshothotho|zhavoshothotho]] || [[word:zhavoshojojo|zhavoshojojo]] || [[word:zhavoshoshosho|zhavoshoshosho]] || [[word:zhavoshoko|zhavoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhavoshothon|zhavoshothon]] || [[word:zhavoshojon|zhavoshojon]] || [[word:zhavoshoshon|zhavoshoshon]] || [[word:zhavoshokon|zhavoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhavoshothoro|zhavoshothoro]] || [[word:zhavoshojoro|zhavoshojoro]] || [[word:zhavoshoshoro|zhavoshoshoro]] || [[word:zhavoshokoro|zhavoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
